title: Qarmatian 'Abdallah b. Said and the Qarmatian attacks against various cities (Hit, Tiberias, al-Kufah), defeat of government forces
description: Qarmatian 'Abdallah b. Said and the Qarmatian attacks against various cities (Hit, Tiberias, al-Kufah), defeat of government forces. Recorded under the year 292 AH (905–906 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 38.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 38
